reasoning: The yfinance tool failed to return data for FI, so I was unable to use the statistical trend analysis. General web searches show that Fiserv has been outperforming with strong momentum (up significantly YTD as of mid-Feb 2025). Taking into account the tendency for stocks to exhibit short-term momentum (pushing short-horizon probability to ~0.55) and strictly following the instructions that uncertainty must increase with the forecast horizon (meaning probabilities for more distant dates must move closer to 0.5), I gradually decayed the probability towards 0.51 for the August resolution date.
